title: A clip assembly
abstract: A clip assembly includes a retainer member (400), having a first cam surface (404), configured to receive and removably retain a component. A resilient closing member (300) includes a first end portion (303) pivotably coupled to a fulcrum (204) of the retainer member (400), and a second end portion (302) adapted to operably engage with the first cam surface (404) so as to move between a first radial trajectory and a second radial trajectory, when moving about the fulcrum (204) between an open position and a closed position. A locking member (200) has a second cam surface (202) configured to move the second end portion (302) from the second radial trajectory towards the first radial trajectory during operation, and removably secure the second end portion (302).
claims: Claims 1. A clip assembly, comprising: a retainer member, having a first cam surface, configured to receive and removably retain a component; a resilient closing member, having a first end portion pivotably coupled to a fulcrum of said retainer member, and a second end portion adapted to operably engage with said first cam surface so as to move between a first radial trajectory and a second radial trajectory, when moving about said fulcrum between an open position and a closed position; a locking member, having a second cam surface configured to move said second end portion from said second radial trajectory towards said first radial trajectory during operation, and removably secure said second end portion. 2. A clip assembly according to claim 1, wherein said retainer member further comprises an openable resilient clamp member having an outer clamp surface and an inner clamp surface. 3. A clip assembly according to claim 2, further comprising a contact member, provided at said inner clamp surface and configured to contactingly engage with the component during use. 4. A clip assembly according to claim 3, wherein said contact member comprises a plurality of circumferentially spaced apart contact elements protruding radially inwards from said inner clamp surface. 5. A clip assembly according to any one of claims 3 and 4, wherein said contact member is formed of an elastomeric material. 6. A clip assembly according to any one of claims 3 to 5, wherein said contact member is removably coupled to said clamp member. 7. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said locking member further comprises a locking recess configured to receive and retain said second end portion. 8. A clip assembly according to claim 7, wherein said second end portion comprises a lip portion configured to latchingly engage with said locking recess. 9. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said resilient closing member further comprises a handle portion, configured to manually move said resilient closing member between said closed position and said open position. 10. A clip assembly according to claim 9, wherein said handle portion is further configured to abuttingly engage with said locking member when in said closed position. 11. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said first end portion is removably coupled to said fulcrum. 12. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a flexible link member coupling said resilient closing member to said retainer member. 13. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said retainer member further comprises a mount configured to affix said clip assembly to an external structure. 14. A clip assembly according to claim 13, wherein said mount comprises a through-hole for a screw fastener or bolt fastener. 15. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said locking member is an integral part of said retainer member. 16. A clip assembly according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein said retainer member, said resilient closing member and said locking member are made from a polymer.
